name: Tokens for Good
description: Compute-routing and research-orchestration platform for public-good scientific workloads. Donors contribute compute budget, platform routes to literature mining (PubMed), molecular screening (PubChem), and structured compute (ClinicalTrials.gov). Philanthropic model. First proof workflow: evidence synthesis.

riskOverrides.note: RESEARCH standard means any output making factual claims requires citation. Tasks involving publishable content, partner-facing outputs, donor PII, or deployment changes are HIGH risk.

currentState.maturity: Early prototype — deployment plumbing mostly done, real execution not yet enabled
currentState.backendStatus: LIVE on Render with mock execution
currentState.nextMilestone: One closed-alpha pilot with a real partner
knownGaps: Durable Redis-backed queue (BullMQ ready, Redis provisioned but fallback active)
SMTP verification delivery (outbox mode ready, real SMTP not configured)
End-to-end hosted validation with all systems live

notes.status: Organism governance applied 2026-04-05. CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, .claude/agents/, .claude/rules/, .claude/settings.json all configured.
notes.designSystem: The Living Archive — Public Sans, forest green #467861, terracotta #3e332f
